queries.question: Empirical research investigates the statistical impact of loan duration in months on credit risk mitigation and reduced default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical research investigates the statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on credit risk drivers and increased default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical research investigates the statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk determinants and elevated default probability.
